title: Title
doc_html:
SUBPART G-1.  INSURANCE HOLDING COMPANY SYSTEM

REGULATORY LAW

§691.1.  Title

This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Insurance Holding Company System Regulatory Law".

Acts 2012, No. 294, §1.
